states.description: Android app drawer with installed apps

visual_cues: list of notes with checkboxes for to-dos

states.description: Joplin side navigation drawer with notebooks
Expanded FAB showing New to-do/New note

visual_cues: checkbox next to title if to-do
red FAB with pencil icon bottom-right

states.description: Set alarm dialog with date/time pickers

strategies.name: CREATE_NOTE_IN_NOTEBOOK
steps: Open app drawer (swipe up) and tap Joplin icon
Tap body area and type content
strategies.success_signal: Returns to notebook view with new note listed showing correct title and content
strategies.fallback: If wrong notebook, re-open drawer and select correct one before tapping FAB

strategies.name: CREATE_TODO_IN_NOTEBOOK
steps: Open hamburger menu and select target notebook
Tap title field and type title
strategies.success_signal: Notebook view shows new item with empty checkbox and correct title
strategies.fallback: If created as note, use options menu 'Convert to to-do' or recreate

strategies.name: EDIT_NOTE_CONTENT
steps: Tap note in list to open viewer
Tap red pencil FAB to enter edit mode
Tap at end of existing text to position cursor
Type new text (prefix with space or newline if appending)
strategies.fallback: If cursor lands mid-word, tap empty area below text or press Enter first

strategies.name: RENAME_NOTE
steps: Tap pencil FAB for edit mode
Tap title; long-press to bring selection menu
strategies.fallback: If text inserted instead of replaced, long-press again, select all, retype

strategies.name: MARK_TODO_COMPLETE
steps: Locate to-do in list (use search if needed)
Tap checkbox to left of title
strategies.success_signal: Checkbox shows checkmark and title becomes greyed; item may disappear if 'Show completed' is off
strategies.fallback: If item not found, use search icon and type keyword

strategies.name: SORT_AND_FILTER_LIST
steps: Select sort criterion (e.g., Title, Created date)
Reopen menu if needed and toggle '[ Reverse sort order ]' for A-Z
Reopen menu and toggle '[ Show completed to-dos ]' as desired
strategies.success_signal: List re-orders alphabetically/by date and completed items hidden/shown per settings
strategies.fallback: Reopen sort menu to verify state of toggles

strategies.name: SEARCH_AND_COUNT
steps: Scroll through results distinguishing notes (no checkbox) vs to-dos (checkbox)
strategies.success_signal: Filtered list shows all matching items
strategies.fallback: Clear search and re-type if results look incomplete

strategies.name: CREATE_NOTEBOOK_AND_ADD_ITEM
strategies.success_signal: Inside new notebook header, new item is listed
strategies.fallback: If notebook not auto-selected, reopen drawer and tap it

strategies.name: SET_REMINDER_ALARM
strategies.success_signal: Alarm dialog closes; date appears in note
strategies.fallback: If permission denied, alarm may not fire; re-enable in system settings

strategies.name: APPEND_TEXT_TO_NOTE
steps: Tap at very end of text or press Enter for new line
Type required text with leading space if needed
strategies.success_signal: Note view shows appended text at end
strategies.fallback: If cursor misplaced, tap below content or use Enter key first

strategies.name: INSERT_HYPERLINK
steps: Tap link icon in formatting toolbar
Tap 'Link description' field, type anchor text
strategies.success_signal: Markdown link inserted in body as [text](url)

strategies.name: ASSIGN_TAG_AND_CONVERT
steps: Tap 'Tags', type tag name, tap OK
strategies.success_signal: Tag added; checkbox removed/added per conversion

dead_ends.failed_action: Repeated tap on item checkbox when list re-sorts after each toggle
dead_ends.note: After checking a to-do, list may reorder/hide item; subsequent taps may hit the wrong item. Verify by visually scanning before re-tapping.

dead_ends.failed_action: Typing title without focusing field first
dead_ends.note: If text field is not focused (keyboard not visible), type action does nothing. Explicitly tap 'Add title' first.

dead_ends.failed_action: Typing new title without selecting old text
dead_ends.note: Text gets inserted into existing title rather than replacing it. Use long-press + 'Select all' first.

dead_ends.failed_action: Manual scrolling to count many items
dead_ends.note: Error-prone. Use the search function to filter and count reliably.

dead_ends.failed_action: Selecting Title without checking Reverse sort order
dead_ends.note: Default reverse may cause Z-A order. Reopen menu and uncheck '[ Reverse sort order ]'.
Sort options live on list screen via the sort icon, not in app Configuration.

dead_ends.failed_action: Tapping wrong colored icon assuming it is Joplin
dead_ends.note: Joplin icon is a blue circle with white 'J'; do not confuse with similarly colored apps like Messages or Broccoli.

categories.name: ADD_ENTRY
categories.precondition: App is open and the target container (list/category/folder) is reachable from the main navigation
abstract_steps: Navigate to the target container if entries are scoped to one
Invoke the primary create action (typically a floating add control)
Choose the entry subtype if multiple are offered
Focus the title/name field and enter the required text
Focus secondary fields (body, metadata) and fill required values
Persist via explicit save or by exiting the editor (auto-save)
failure_modes: Tapping placeholder text that isn't interactive instead of using the FAB
Typing before the input field is focused so text is dropped
Creating in the wrong container because navigation was skipped
Selecting wrong subtype (e.g., note vs task)
Missing required configuration that blocks save
verification_checklist: New entry visible in the target container's list
Title and content match the requested values
Subtype indicator (e.g., checkbox for tasks) is correct
No error/toast indicating save failure

categories.name: EDIT_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Target entry exists and can be opened from a list
abstract_steps: Locate entry via list scroll or search
Switch to edit mode via edit affordance
Position cursor at the desired location (end of text for append, select all for replace)
failure_modes: Cursor lands inside an existing word leading to corrupted text
Typing inserts instead of replacing when text isn't selected
Edit mode not entered so input is ignored
Accidentally opening wrong entry with similar name
verification_checklist: Viewer mode shows updated text
No leftover artifacts from previous content
Entry still exists in the same container

categories.name: DELETE_OR_COMPLETE_ENTRY
categories.precondition: Entry/task is visible in a list and supports a completion or delete action
abstract_steps: Locate target via scroll or search
Tap the dedicated completion checkbox or delete control
If multiple items, repeat for each
failure_modes: List reorders after each action causing misclicks on next item
Filter hides completed items immediately, making verification harder
Tapping the row instead of the checkbox opens the entry
verification_checklist: Checkbox shows checked state or item removed from active list
Item count decreased as expected

categories.name: QUERY_INFO
categories.precondition: Data of interest exists somewhere in the app
abstract_steps: Use search or scroll to locate target
Open entry if needed to read full content
failure_modes: Mis-counting items by confusing similar subtypes
Scrolling past target items
Reading a stale cached view
verification_checklist: Answer matches text visible on screen
Distinguished correct subtype (e.g., task vs note) when relevant

categories.name: NAVIGATE_TO
failure_modes: Tapping wrong icon (top-right vs top-left)
Opening a similarly named item by accident
verification_checklist: Header reflects target name
Expected list/content for that section is visible

categories.name: CONFIGURE_VIEW
categories.precondition: On a list/main screen that supports view options
abstract_steps: Toggle direction or visibility flags as needed
Close menu and verify list reflects settings
failure_modes: Forgetting to disable reverse-order toggle
Looking for options in global settings rather than list view
Menu closes after one selection requiring reopening
verification_checklist: List ordering matches desired key/direction
Visibility toggles produce the expected filtered list
Reopening the menu confirms persisted selections

categories.name: CREATE_CONTAINER
abstract_steps: Open navigation drawer or relevant management screen
failure_modes: Required dependent settings missing (e.g., region/language) blocking creation
Container created but not auto-selected, causing subsequent items to land in wrong place
verification_checklist: New container appears in list
Subsequent additions show inside it

categories.name: ATTACH_MEDIA
categories.precondition: Editor supports media attachment and external camera/gallery is available
failure_modes: Permission dialogs interrupt flow
Accidentally tapping image area dismisses or opens unintended picker
Source returns no recent items
verification_checklist: Media preview visible in editor
Entry saved with media attached

categories.name: SET_REMINDER
failure_modes: Skipping permission grant means alarms won't fire
Confusing date confirmation with final save
verification_checklist: Alarm indicator visible on entry
System permission granted
